name: Gap / Enhancement

## Type

- [ ] Build gap (step in guide wrong or missing)
- [ ] Evidence gap (cannot demonstrate a claim)
- [ ] Scope gap (guide missed something important)
- [ ] Enhancement (improvement to existing system)
